title: InboxItem 2.0
description: One waiting responsibility across every run (plan B2). Frozen at P0; the projection lands with API-3/P5. Aggregates human tasks, exhausted budgets, unknown external results and recovery findings into one actor-aware queue. allowed_commands is already authorised for the requesting actor: a reader receives [].

task_id.description: Bare HumanTask id for /human-tasks/{task_id}/... paths; null for non-human kinds.

deadline_at.description: UTC ISO-8601; null when the item has no deadline.

quorum.description: Present only for human items with participants.

requires_actor_action.description: True when the requesting actor holds a command that resolves this item. Drives the badge count; badge and list must come from this same projection.
